_patch_meta.description: C10 DimReview R164 truthfulness — 10 group dimension assignments + registry stamp + 1 SD pointer. 3 UNCLASSIFIED groups assigned; 1 dimension change. Manual application required.
_patch_meta.normalization_note: CC-side label normalisation 2026-05-02: 10 dimension labels prefixed with sort order to match wa_vocab_set.DIMENSION_LABEL. Researcher waiver extends to C10 cluster DimReview cycle.

operations.description: 1197-001 G0225 alētheia (sanctification through truth) — Transformation / HUMAN. Automated label confirmed.
1197-002 G0225 alētheia (will's orientation toward/against truth) — Volition / HUMAN. Was UNCLASSIFIED — assigned. Obeying vs refusing truth is a volitional inner act.
1197-003 G0225 alētheia (integrity, authenticity as inner character) — Moral Character / HUMAN. Automated label confirmed.

1197-004 G0225 alētheia (Spirit of truth — human capacity/incapacity to receive the Spirit) — Dependence/Creatureliness / HUMAN. Was UNCLASSIFIED. The group names the creature's receptivity to the Spirit's indwelling — constitutive dependence.
1197-005 G0225 alētheia (worship in spirit and truth) — Relational Disposition / HUMAN. Automated label confirmed.
1197-006 G0225 alētheia (knowledge of truth as saving event) — Cognition / HUMAN. Automated label confirmed.
6587-001 G0228 alēthinos (true heart drawn near to God; genuine orientation) — Relational Disposition / HUMAN. Was UNCLASSIFIED — assigned.
6588-001 G0227 alēthēs (truthfulness as inner character quality) — Moral Character / HUMAN. Automated label confirmed.
6589-001 G0230 alēthōs (truly — qualifier of inner recognition and knowing) — Cognition / HUMAN. Automated label confirmed.
6590-001 G0226 alētheuō (speaking truth in love toward others) — Relational Disposition / HUMAN. CHANGED from Moral Character: orientation-toward-another is dominant.

record.description: R164 (alētheia family) shows truth operating across five inner-being dimensions: Transformation (sanctification), Volition (will toward/against truth), Moral Character (integrity/authenticity), Dependence/Creatureliness (receptivity to Spirit of truth), Relational Disposition (worship in truth; truthful speech), and Cognition (knowledge of truth as saving event). This breadth is itself a finding: truth in the NT is not a single inner-being category but a force engaging the whole person. Supplementary to pre-existing DIM-164-SD001 (registry label-fit question); this pointer adds the dimension-breadth observation for Session D synthesis.

operations.description: SD pointer DIM-164-SD002 — alētheia family engages all five primary inner-being dimensions.
Registry stamp — R164 truthfulness DimReview Complete.
